content: Lydia: By Dibella's gaping cunt, this storm's pissing down like a giant took a frosty piss on all of Skyrim. You mages ever try to magic this shit away, or do you just rub your robes together and hope for the best? Drevis Neloren: Hmm? Oh, the weather... yes. Illusion magic could theoretically alter one's perception of cold, but actually changing atmospheric conditions would require—wait, were those actual tits protruding from your armor or just a very aggressive enchantment? Lydia: HAH! Typical elf—can't decide whether to lecture or leer. At least the Stormcloaks know cold builds character. You college types probably jerk off to frost spells in your featherbeds while real Nords like me break ice with our knees to fuck in snowbanks. Drevis Neloren: You barbarians and your... . A well-placed Calm spell could prevent all this vulgar exertion. Though I suppose your brute lord MJR enjoys watching you labor—quite literally—under his command. Lydia: Damn right he does. While you were hiding in your library, MJR split a Thalmor's skull last week—his cock got so hard I had to ride him right there in the bloodstained snow. Try conjuring kind of magic, gray-skin. Drevis Neloren: Tut-tut, such . But tell me, does your beloved thane ever tire of your... repetitive technique? Illusion offers . Why rut like animals when one could experience, say, the sensation of being devoured by a dozen ghostly tongues? Lydia: Save your freak spells for the milk-drinkers. MJR likes his women solid enough to choke on—ask Serana next time she's not busy gargling his cum. Now point me to something flammable before I freeze my nipples off. Drevis Neloren: By all means, warm yourself. Though if frostbite claims certain assets, I’ve a rather healing spell that requires... intimate application.

Lydia: Pfft, save your limp-wristed magic for the weaklings. Nothing warms a true Nord's blood like splitting skulls and riding a dragonborn’s cock till sunrise. Drevis Neloren: hit it till it stops moving.
